title: Keyword research sidecar
description: Written next to a planned article as <slug>.research.json by the keyword-research skill. Provider-agnostic: any data source (web-search, manual, api) fills this same contract. seo-article requires it before drafting.

data_quality.description: measured = real numbers from a tool/API; estimated = inferred (e.g. web-search has no exact volume). NEVER label a guess as 'measured'.

search_volume.description: Monthly volume if known; null if the source cannot provide it. Do not fabricate.

difficulty.description: Keyword difficulty: low|med|high, a 0-100 number, or null if unknown.

serp_snapshot.description: Real top results observed for this keyword (the competitive picture).

related_queries.description: Real related searches / People-Also-Ask harvested from the source.

content_gaps.description: What existing top results miss — the differentiation opportunity.

monetization_fit.description: Which cluster this keyword serves (see content-plan).

decision.description: Gate for drafting: seo-article must refuse unless this is 'pursue'.
